# Stage10 CP BW2 Core15 No-FDTD Audit

No FDTD was run. This audit reads only the completed core15 CSV/JSON/MD outputs.

Target convention: `R=(x-iy)/sqrt(2)`, `L=(x+iy)/sqrt(2)`, target channel `R_in -> L_out`; negative `DoCP_RminusL` is desired L-output dominance.

- Baseline candidate: `BW2_J1J2_D194_T90_PSI97_H525`

- ratio_454 = 235.521988
